description: A family arrives at a theme park entrance and presents their pre-purchased e-tickets on a smartphone.

nodes.task_description: Scan the QR code for each of the family member's tickets.
Validate the tickets to ensure they are for the correct date and have not been used.

expected_outcome.value: The system confirms all tickets are valid for entry.

nodes.task_description: Allow the family to enter the park.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the family can proceed into the park.
